name: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) MCP Server
what_it_does: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book / XHS) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the Xiaohongshu social media and e-commerce platform — searching notes and posts, retrieving user content, accessing trending topics, and integrating XHS social data into agent-driven content research and marketing workflows for China's leading lifestyle platform.
use_cases: Searching trending content and topics on Xiaohongshu from market research agents
Retrieving competitor product reviews from competitive intelligence agents
Analyzing user-generated content for brand monitoring from social listening agents
Finding influencer content for marketing research from content strategy agents
Publishing notes and posts to XHS from content creation agents
Tracking product mentions and sentiment from e-commerce agents
not_for: Teams without Xiaohongshu account or cookie authentication
best_when: A marketer or researcher needs to access Xiaohongshu data for the China market — searching notes, monitoring trends, or analyzing content on China's leading lifestyle and e-commerce social platform.
avoid_when: You're not targeting the China market or don't have legitimate XHS access.

auth.notes: XHS session cookies required for authentication. Must log into Xiaohongshu and extract browser cookies. Cookie-based auth is fragile and may expire frequently.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free to use — requires XHS account
pricing.notes: Community MCP is free. XHS account (free) required. This is an unofficial wrapper using browser cookies, not an official API.

performance.rate_limits: XHS rate limits apply — unofficial API, limits unclear

known_agent_gotchas: Cookie-based authentication expires frequently — needs manual renewal
Unofficial XHS API — may break without warning after XHS platform updates
Must comply with XHS ToS — automated scraping may violate terms
Community MCP primarily maintained by Chinese developer community
China-specific platform — VPN may be required outside mainland China
High fragility: XHS actively rate-limits and blocks automated access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Browser cookies as auth — high security risk if leaked. Community MCP. Unofficial API. Comply with XHS ToS. Data residency in China.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cookie auth is risky. Unofficial API. Community MCP. China data residency.
